gloss: the distance between where a rule is STATED and where it is CHECKED. design.md states the copy rule and craft-evals checks it, so that gap is zero. The same rule applied to my replies is stated in memory and checked nowhere, so it decayed within one message.

Trident house-rule 1 ranks detectors: deterministic root-cause > deterministic detection > LLM-judge > written reminder. A reminder is the weakest tier and every reminder-tier rule in this session decayed. Naming the tier is how you predict which rules will hold.
